calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HARRY ANDREWS dba FOURSTAR SOFTWARE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Denied. Defendant failed to file a demurrer, as required by CRC 3.1320(a). Defendant only filed a notice of motion and memorandum of points and authority. (See Weil & Brown, Cal Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (The Rutter Group 2013) par. 7:98.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories From Defendants
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer S. Grock, of Van Vleck Turner & Zaller LLP, Tel. 323.592.3505, for plaintiffs and moving party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF SFS 39, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories From Defendants is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For A Protective Order Re Deft'S Req.'S For Production, Set One (Nos 1-294) And Special Interrogatories, Set One (Nos 1-128)
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony J. Zaller, of Van Vleck Turner & Zaller LLP, Tel. 323.592.3505, for defendant and opposing party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF SFS 39, INC., Mtn For A Protective Order Re Deft'S Req.'S For Production, Set One (Nos 1-294) And Special Interrogatories, Set One (Nos 1-128) is granted without prejudice to Defendant's right to propound more limited special interrogatories and/or requests for production of documents. No monetary sanctions imposed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For A Protective Order Re Deft'S Req.'S For Production, Set One (Nos 1-294) And Special Interrogatories, Set One (Nos 1-128)
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Continued To Sep-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF SFS 39, INC.'s Motion For A Protective Order Re Defendant'S Request For Production, Set One (Nos 1-294) And Special Interrogatories, Set One (Nos 1-128) is continued to September 4, 2014 per request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
